claim: Golli-deficient T-cells are dormant in initial clonal expansion.

result.claim: Golli-deficient T-cells are dormant in initial clonal expansion.
result.reasoning: No direct evidence was found to support or refute the claim that Golli-deficient T-cells are dormant in initial clonal expansion. Searches for "Golli-deficient T-cells are dormant in initial clonal expansion", "Golli protein T-cell function clonal expansion", and "Golli protein T-cell clonal expansion" did not yield any relevant propositions or chunks mentioning Golli protein in relation to T-cell dormancy or clonal expansion. The retrieved results discussed other types of deficient cells, general T-cell expansion, or B-cell clonal expansion, but none specifically addressed the role of Golli in T-cell initial clonal expansion.
